modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be distracting grammar usage and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to update kuraCloud software urgently.

full_description_text:  
So, I was trying to get kuraCloud up to date, but it seems like it’s stuck or something. I really need to make sure it’s running the latest version for my field work. Can someone help me figure out how to get this update done?
short_description: Need to update kuraCloud software urgently.
description: So, I was trying to get kuraCloud up to date, but it seems like it’s stuck or something. I really need to make sure it’s running the latest version for my field work. Can someone help me figure out how to get this update done?
